reasoning: The dagger sprite introduces a crossed pixel-art blade with a sharp, angular silhouette and a cold silver/gray metallic body accented with cyan. A dagger is inherently an aggressive weapon item pushing toward dungeon-crawler territory (explicitly out-of-tone). The composite scene is measurably more combat-oriented and less fairy-tale than the baseline. Sprite fails the mood gate.
